title: Low-pressure CVD grown Si-doped β-Ga₂O₃ films with promising electron mobilities and high growth rates
authors: Khan, S. A., Ibrelić, A., Margiotta, S., & Bhuiyan, A. F. M.
description:
Reports low-pressure CVD growth of Si-doped β-Ga₂O₃ with strong electron mobility and high growth rates, 
supporting improved device-grade epitaxy.
